title: BRANDLE OS — ONE‑PASTE REBUILD PACK

sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Single prompt to rebuild full BRANDLE OS/METAVERSE in one Lovable run under the correct owner account.

sections.title: How to Use
sections.summary: Sign in with intended owner email, create new project, paste full prompt, build.

summary: One-paste Lovable rebuild prompt consolidating the full canon: Health Gauge, Receipts, Media Kit, Twin Mode, Governance, Pulse cadence, core engines, and metaverse expansion modules.
